purpose: Portable overlay for repo-wide quality review and deterministic gate improvement.

recommended_when: A repo needs an explicit quality posture review or gate-tightening pass.
Deterministic validation commands should be treated as part of the operator workflow.
avoid_when: The task is one narrow bug fix with no repo-wide quality question.

notes: Designed as an overlay profile rather than a replacement for the constitutional core.
Uses the checked-in quality adapter and canonical quality runner as the repo-owned baseline.
